name: Casamara

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.
Dinner/Dessert/Mocktails

products.name: East Coast Oysters (6pc)
notes: Tarragon cucumber mignonette, horseradish, lemon, housemade hot sauce

products.name: Otoro & Melon
notes: Tuna belly, chili, honeydew, cantaloupe, mint, extra virgin olive oil

products.name: Crispy Squash
notes: Labneh, mint, spiced maple, aleppo pepper

products.name: Sardine Toast
notes: Sourdough, avocado aioli, pickled red onion, almonds, fresh herbs

products.name: Grilled Cabbage Salad
notes: Yogurt & tahini dressing, pomegranate, garlic, dill, sesame

products.name: Potato & Mozzarella Dumpling
notes: Truffle, wildflower honey, brown butter, aged balsamic

products.name: Truffle Bucatini Cacio e Pepe
notes: Pecorino romano, black pepper, butter

products.name: Wild Boar Gemelli
notes: Bolognese, red wine, coprino goat cheese

products.name: Wagyu Braised Rigatoni
notes: Red wine, pecorino, rosemary

products.name: Pork Shoulder
notes: Candied pear mostarda, pumpkin sesame crumble, maple jus

products.name: 12oz Striploin
notes: Mushroom & onion jus, green peppercorns, bone marrow butter

products.name: Whole Grilled Branzino
notes: Extra virgin olive oil, caper leaves, lemon

products.name: Scallops
notes: Lardo, smoked cauliflower, agrodolce, red pepper, brown butter

products.name: Brussels Sprouts
notes: Caesar dressing, parmesan, urfa chili, croutons

products.name: Roasted Beets
notes: Labneh & feta, pistachio, orange, honey, olive oil

products.name: Apple Crostata
notes: Brown butter gelato, apple butter, apple cider anglaise

products.name: Basque Cheesecake
notes: Walnuts, toffee sauce, bruleed figs

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Official Dinner, Drinks, Dessert menu lists current dishes, desserts, mocktails, and ingredient descriptions.
Official homepage identifies Casamara, lists 1337 Connecticut Ave NW, Washington, DC, and links the restaurant menus.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.
